---
layout: cv
title: Isaac Newtons's CV
---
# David Klein
BYU-Idaho Accounting Student.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="isaac@applesdofall.org">isaac@applesdofall.org</a>
| <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaac_Newton">My wikipedia page</a>
</div>


## Currently

Living

### Specialized in

Accounting


### Research interests

Nothing


## Education

`2025 - Now`
BYU-Idaho Accounting Student



## Awards





## Publications



### Journals



### Patents




## Occupation

<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
